3254780.name: Rainerles Abenteuer
3254780.description:
Rainerle has problems...a lot of problems.

One of them is his house. Completely deranged and also the target of the Haider mob, it is becoming increasingly run down.

Can Rainer repair at least some of the damage?

The game impresses with its unique graphic style, which was drawn entirely by hand, and its humorous storytelling, which takes players into an imaginative world. With a combination of point-and-click mechanics and puzzle elements, it challenges the creativity and logical thinking of the players.
3254780.supported_languages:
德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
